immutable_record_notice: Once frozen, this study manifest is immutable. Changes require a new record version linked to the superseded raw-byte digest.

subject.name: SYNTHETIC-DRY-RUN tiny propositional formal-system fixture
subject.definition: A deliberately tiny two-valued propositional system over atoms A and B with the sole theory assumption A. It exists only to exercise serialization of the FORMAL_ANALYSIS contract.
subject.boundary: This fixture is not FMO-0.1, is not a model of cognition or memory behavior, and cannot establish formal correctness, scientific validity, mechanism performance, or production readiness.

assumptions: ASSUMPTION-9902-BOOLEAN-SEMANTICS: A and B each take exactly one truth value from {false, true}.
ASSUMPTION-9902-THEORY-A: The complete theory under test is the singleton set {A}.
ASSUMPTION-9902-FINITE-DOMAIN: The semantic search domain is exactly the four valuations over A and B.
consistency_or_satisfiability_checks: Exhaustively enumerate the four frozen valuations and retain at least one valuation satisfying the complete theory {A}.
intended_entailments: Check that every retained model of the theory {A} satisfies PROP-9902-A.
non_entailments_or_countermodels: Check that PROP-9902-B is not entailed by {A} and retain a theory-satisfying valuation with B=false as a countermodel.
primary_method_profile.proof_or_verification_method: Replay all four valuations against the exact truth conditions; retain witnesses, theory models, and the countermodel. This is bounded exhaustive verification, not syntax checking.
primary_method_profile.semantic_validity_check: Evaluate theory satisfaction and proposition truth in each declared valuation; no inference is accepted from parse or schema validity alone.
primary_method_profile.counterexample_search: Search the complete frozen four-valuation domain and retain the first theory model that falsifies PROP-9902-B.

research_question: Can the accepted FORMAL_ANALYSIS record path serialize exact subject, profile, formal-system, semantic-analysis, atomic-finding, and immutable-closeout bindings end to end?

hypothesis.claim: The exact synthetic theory {A} has a model, entails PROP-9902-A, and does not entail PROP-9902-B, for which a countermodel exists in the complete frozen valuation domain.
hypothesis.competing_explanation: An apparent result could arise from incomplete enumeration or syntax-only inspection rather than semantic evaluation.
hypothesis.predicted_observation: Exactly two of four valuations satisfy {A}; all such models satisfy PROP-9902-A; and the model A=true,B=false falsifies PROP-9902-B.
hypothesis.falsifier: Missing or duplicate valuations, no theory model, a theory model falsifying PROP-9902-A, or failure to retain a theory model falsifying PROP-9902-B.

analyses.question: Does the complete exact synthetic theory {A} have at least one model in the frozen four-valuation domain?
analyses.method: Enumerate each valuation exactly once, evaluate A, and retain all theory-satisfaction outcomes and one witness.
analyses.decision_rule: Return POSITIVE only if at least one valuation satisfies {A}; return NEGATIVE if none does; mark INVALID if coverage is incomplete or duplicated.

analyses.question: Does {A} entail PROP-9902-A while failing to entail PROP-9902-B with a retained countermodel?
analyses.method: Inspect every theory model, test both proposition truth conditions, and retain a theory model falsifying PROP-9902-B.
analyses.decision_rule: Return POSITIVE only if no theory model falsifies PROP-9902-A and at least one retained theory model falsifies PROP-9902-B; otherwise NEGATIVE; mark INVALID if coverage is incomplete or duplicated.

replication_criteria: Recompute every recorded SHA-256 digest from raw repository bytes.
Enumerate exactly the four frozen valuations with no duplicates or omissions.
Recover two theory models, witness A=true,B=false, entailment of PROP-9902-A, and the retained countermodel to PROP-9902-B.
Validate all schema-backed records and isolated indexes against the repository Draft 2020-12 schemas.

rejection_criteria.condition: No frozen valuation satisfies the exact theory {A}.
rejection_criteria.rationale: The first bounded claim predicts existence of a model.

rejection_criteria.condition: A theory model falsifies PROP-9902-A or no theory model falsifies PROP-9902-B.
rejection_criteria.rationale: Either observation contradicts the exact planned semantic relations.

rejection_criteria.condition: Any one of the four declared valuations is missing, duplicated, or evaluated under a changed theory.
rejection_criteria.rationale: The bounded verification claim depends on complete enumeration of the exact frozen domain.

ethics_scope.rationale: This isolated dry run uses only a hand-authored two-atom synthetic formal system and no humans, participant data, model calls, or datasets.

assets: Raw-byte integrity of the frozen subject, profile, formal inputs, protocol, findings, and closeout bindings
threats: Overinterpreting lifecycle words such as FROZEN or PUBLISHED as program acceptance or evidence
controls: Verified SHA-256 references over raw local bytes
Reserved 9902 identifiers and repeated SYNTHETIC-DRY-RUN non-evidentiary notices
Isolated example indexes that do not alter production registries
security_and_privacy_analysis.data_retention_and_deletion: Retain this synthetic fixture family for contract regression, including negative or invalid dispositions if later superseded; it contains no personal or secret data.
residual_risks: A reader may mistake a trivial bounded truth-table result for validation of a substantive memory formalism despite explicit boundaries.

limitations: This is a NON-EVIDENTIARY synthetic dry run and is absent from production registries.
The two-atom system is deliberately trivial and is not FMO-0.1 or a memory model.
Manual serialization plus deterministic validation does not constitute independent validation.
No solver, language model, human subject, participant data, dataset, or network service was used.
The planned-output references remain PENDING in the frozen manifest because result bytes are post-freeze artifacts; published findings bind their actual bytes.

mechanism_maturity_boundary.rationale: The exact target is a mechanism-free synthetic foundational subject used only to exercise contract serialization.
